title: Section
description: A learning unit within a chapter, typically containing educational content, instructions, and examples. Sections are stored in numbered directories within chapters (e.g., 01-chapter/01-section-name/). Each section directory must contain section.yaml and description.md.

code.description: Unique identifier for this section. Must start and end with alphanumeric, can contain hyphens.

title.description: Display name for the section shown in the UI.

shortDescription.description: Optional brief summary of the section content.

estimatedDuration.description: Optional estimated time to complete this section (e.g., '15m', '1h').

video.description: Optional URL to a video resource for this section.

thumbnail.description: Optional image URL for section card thumbnail. NOTE: Currently unused by the training platform.

thumbnailDescription.description: Optional description or alt text for the thumbnail image. NOTE: Currently unused by the training platform.
